_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national cron (Adam Johns)
_meta.note: Federal House batch CA-01..CA-05 — Gallagher (R, won 2026 special outright 6/2/2026 61.6%, advances to Nov general vs McGuire), vacant-ca-1 (placeholder superseded by Gallagher → former), Huffman (D incumbent CA-02), Kiley (now INDEPENDENT after 3/9/2026 party-switch, currently CA-03 → running new CA-06), McClintock (R incumbent CA-05). HETERODOX-D catches: Huffman INTRODUCED 2026 Iran War Powers Resolution + ORIGINAL cosponsor 2002 AUMF repeal + $0 AIPAC (TrackAIPAC shows $58K from J Street ONLY, $0 AIPAC) + cosponsor Lee-Pocan $100B Pentagon cut + voted AGAINST 2020 NDAA. HETERODOX-R catches: McClintock voted NAY on Mayorkas impeachment (constitutional grounds) + YES on Ukraine aid + NAY on Iran WPR + AIPAC $45,538 + bipartisan Pentagon Streamline Budgeting w/ Jayapal. Kiley party-switched to Independent 3/9/2026 + AIPAC $86,986 + voted NO on Iran WPR + provided 218th signature forcing Ukraine discharge petition against Speaker Johnson. CURRENCY: Gallagher status: won special, advances to general; Kiley party-switched, district 3 → running CA-06 in 2026.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-01 (R · won 2026 special outright 61.6% after Doug LaMalfa resignation; sworn to fill remainder; advances to Nov 2026 general vs Mike McGuire D in Prop-50-redrawn Harris+ district · former CA Assembly Minority Leader 2022-2025 · Trump-endorsed)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_curated. Won 6/2/2026 CA-01 special outright (61.6%) advancing to Nov 2026 general against Mike McGuire (D) in newly Prop-50-redrawn Harris+10 district. Scored from CA Assembly record 2014-2025 (GOP Minority Leader 2/2022-9/2025), public floor speeches, press releases, FEC/TrackAIPAC, Trump endorsement coverage, NRA-PVF A rating, CRPA + CA Pro-Life PAC endorsements. HARD TRUEs: AB 957 floor speech opposing gender-affirmation custody requirement (Democrats cut his mic citing detransition study); SB 866 + general anti-vaccine-mandate leadership ('unconscionable' Newsweek headline); AB 1708 / sanctuary-state opposition (public attack on May 2024 vote keeping SB 54 protection for illegal-immigrant sex offenders); NRA-PVF A endorsement + CRPA endorsement. HARD TRUE on foreign_policy_restraint q3 — TrackAIPAC.com does NOT list Gallagher as funded; $0 AIPAC PAC money (caveat: he led the CA Assembly Republican resolution condemning Hamas, so pro-Israel rhetoric is strong without AIPAC PAC funding YET; watch federal Q3/Q4 2026 FEC). Endorsement coalition is establishment-Republican (Speaker Johnson, Scalise, Emmer, NRCC, CAGOP, HJTA, PORAC, CA Farm Bureau, CRPA, Reform California) — no Freedom-Caucus or restraint-coded endorsers. Campaign-issues page deliberately narrow (cost-of-living/crime/energy/property rights/border/families/farms) for now-purple district — produces many honest nulls across christian_liberty, economic_stewardship, election_integrity, foreign_policy_restraint, self_defense q0/q2-q4, family q0/q3/q4.
profile.background: 6th-generation Sutter County rice and walnut farmer; attorney since 2007 (UC Berkeley BA, UC Davis JD top of class). Sutter County Supervisor District 5 2009-2014. California State Assembly since 12/1/2014 (AD-3 then AD-4 after redistricting). GOP Assembly Minority Leader 2/8/2022 - 9/16/2025. Wife Janna; 5 children; resides Sutter County. Won 6/2/2026 CA-01 special outright (61.6%) replacing Doug LaMalfa.

james-gallagher-ca-01.notes_set: CA-01 R — Trump-endorsed winner of 6/2/2026 special election (61.6% outright, no runoff), advancing to Nov 2026 general vs Mike McGuire (D) in Prop-50-redrawn Harris+10 district. HARD TRUEs (cited): biblical_marriage q2 (AB 957 floor speech citing detransition study, mic cut by Dem majority); family_child_sovereignty q1 (SB 866 minor-vaccine-consent + AB 957 + 'Democrats Continue Assault on Parents' framing); border_immigration q2 (public attack on CA sanctuary-state vote protecting illegal-immigrant sex offenders); industry_capture q0 (Newsweek 'unconscionable' on proposed student vaccine mandate); self_defense q1 (NRA-PVF A + CRPA endorsement); foreign_policy_restraint q3 ($0 AIPAC per TrackAIPAC absence). SOFT TRUEs: sanctity_of_life q0 (floor speech 'my twin boys were alive and they were people at 18 weeks' opposing SB 1142/SCA 10); q4 (CA Pro-Life Council endorsement, voted NO on AB 2223 perinatal-death bill, no PP/NARAL/EMILY money record); biblical_marriage q4 (SB 1100 'assault on parents'); family_child_sovereignty q2 (parental-rights framing on SB 1100); border_immigration q0 (Trump endorsement statement cited border security as priority); industry_capture q3 (CA Farm Bureau endorsement + 'protecting farms from regulation' issues plank). NULLs across most of christian_liberty / economic_stewardship / election_integrity / foreign_policy_restraint q0-q2,q4 / self_defense q0,q2-q4 — campaign issues page deliberately narrow for purple district, no public position located on Christian symbols/Sabbath/CBDC/Fed/BBA/WEF/paper ballots/Zuckerbucks/war powers/AUMF/WHO/UN/constitutional carry/NFA-GCA/castle-doctrine/ATF/PREP-shields/Big Ag. Per RESOLUTE methodology, do NOT infer from party. Pro-Israel rhetoric strong (led CA Assembly Hamas-condemnation resolution Jan 2024) but no AIPAC PAC money yet.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-02 (D incumbent since 1/3/2013 · Ranking Member House Natural Resources · founding co-chair Congressional Freethought Caucus · running 2026 re-election, led 6/2/2026 jungle primary ~52% in Prop-50-redrawn CA-02)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. Scored from 119th Congress roll calls, House Natural Resources ranking-member record, Freethought Caucus founding, OpenSecrets/TrackAIPAC FEC, Heritage Action scorecard (lifetime 8%), Planned Parenthood/EMILY's List/Equality Act sponsorship lists. Religion = HARD-cited self-identification as 'secular humanist / non-theist' (2017 disclosure, only openly humanist member of Congress). FOUR HARD HETERODOX-D catches: (1) PERSONALLY INTRODUCED Iran War Powers Resolution 2026 (with Khanna/Jayapal/Dexter/Brown/Jacobs) = TRUE on foreign_policy_restraint q0; (2) ORIGINAL cosponsor H.R. 256 117th Cong (2002 AUMF repeal) signed 1/11/2021 = TRUE on q1; (3) $0 AIPAC PAC money — TrackAIPAC shows $58,412 Israel-lobby total is 100% J Street PAC = TRUE on q3; (4) cosponsor Lee-Pocan $100B Pentagon-cut amendment + voted AGAINST 2020 NDAA + consistent Pentagon-spending-reduction record = TRUE on industry_capture q4. Possible 5th catch on industry_capture q2 (anti-Big-Ag rhetoric moderated by Point Reyes ranchers defense). christian_liberty q3 = HARD FALSE (Freethought Caucus actively opposes school prayer); q4 left null per strict standard (humanist strict-separationism would oppose ALL religious displays equally, including non-Christian, but no direct anti-non-Christian-display quote located).
profile.religion: Secular humanist / non-theist (openly self-identified; founding co-chair of the Congressional Freethought Caucus since April 2018)
profile.background: BA UCSB 1986 magna cum laude; JD Boston College Law 1990 cum laude. Water-policy attorney (NRDC senior attorney). CA State Assembly AD-6 2006-2012. U.S. Representative CA-02 since 1/3/2013. Ranking Member House Natural Resources Committee (since 1/3/2025). Co-founder Congressional Freethought Caucus (April 2018, with Raskin, McNerney, Kildee). Only openly self-identified humanist/non-theist member of Congress. Wife Susan; two children.

jared-huffman.notes_set: CA-02 D INCUMBENT — long-tenured progressive water/conservation lawyer, Ranking Member House Natural Resources. HARD HETERODOX-D catches (cited): foreign_policy_restraint q0 (introduced Iran War Powers Resolution 2026); q1 (original cosponsor 2002 AUMF repeal H.R. 256 117th Cong); q3 ($0 AIPAC PAC, TrackAIPAC shows $58,412 from J Street ONLY); industry_capture q4 (Lee-Pocan $100B Pentagon-cut cosponsor + voted AGAINST 2020 NDAA + 'urge reduction in Pentagon spending' press release); q2 (anti-Big-Ag/anti-corporate-consolidation agriculture platform + Center for Food Safety GMO letter + Preservation of Antibiotics for Medical Treatment cosponsor — SOFT, moderated by Point Reyes ranchers defense). HARD FALSEs (cited): sanctity_of_life q0/q1/q4 (100% PP/NARAL/CalNOW lifetime score; PP Action Fund endorsee); biblical_marriage q0/q1 (YEA on Respect for Marriage Act H.R. 8404 12/8/2022); q2/q4 (Equality Act cosponsor + LGBTQ+ Equality Caucus); family_child_sovereignty q0 (LED Schakowsky-Raskin opposition to Educational Choice for Children Act); q2 (SOGI cosponsor inverts); christian_liberty q3 (Freethought Caucus actively opposed Trump-Barr school-prayer guidance; SCOTUS religious-charter ruling statement: 'clear violation of separation of church and state'); election_integrity q0/q2/q3 (YEA H.R. 1 For The People Act, federalizes away from hand-count); border q0/q1/q2 (anti-wall, anti-DACA-termination, pro-CA-sanctuary); self_defense q0/q1/q2 (cosponsor H.R. 1808 AWB + Capitol-grounds member-carry ban + Giffords/Everytown-aligned). NULLs (looked, no public position located): sanctity q2/q3 (ESCR/IVF/euthanasia); biblical q3 (no-fault divorce); family q1/q3/q4 (parental notification/porn age-verify/faith-based adoption — federal); christian_liberty q0/q1/q2/q4; economic stewardship q0/q1/q3 (CBDC/sound money/usury); election q4 (Zuckerbucks); border q3 (E-Verify); self_defense q3 (castle/SYG); foreign q2 (aid-conditioning on Christian persecution specifically); industry_capture q1/q3 (PREP shields/raw-milk). set.office: U.S. Representative CA-03 (Independent caucusing with R Conference since 3/9/2026 party-switch — only Independent in House; running 2026 re-election in newly-redrawn CA-06 Sacramento/Placer; Chair K-12 subcmte House Ed & Workforce)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing party_default. PARTY VERIFICATION: 'I' in scorecard is CORRECT — Kiley formally changed from R to Independent on 3/9/2026, remains in House Republican Conference (only Independent in House). Filed for re-election in newly-redrawn CA-06 (Sacramento/Placer) on 3/6/2026. Religion correction: non-denominational Christian (NOT Catholic) per Pew 119th Congress list. Recall correction: finished 6th of 46 with 3.5% (not 4th). AB 1314 was authored by Essayli/Gallagher, not Kiley — Kiley publicly championed it. Scored from 118th-119th Congress roll calls, TrackAIPAC, SBA Pro-Life, NRA-PVF, Heritage Action (lifetime 64% — middling), public X feed, CalPERS ESG-probe coverage. HARD HETERODOX-R catches: (1) party-switch to Independent 3/9/2026; (2) AIPAC + NORPAC pro-Israel PAC career $86,986 = FALSE on q3 foreign_policy_restraint; (3) voted NO on Iran War Powers Resolution (215-208) — only 4 Rs voted YES (Massie/Fitzpatrick/Barrett/Davidson), Kiley sided with executive; (4) provided 218th signature May 2026 forcing Ukraine aid discharge petition against Speaker Johnson, joined only by Fitzpatrick + Bacon among ex-Republicans. Strong on parental rights / anti-vaccine-mandates (his statewide brand from 2021 recall vs Newsom) / school choice (ECCA tax-credit ESA cosponsor) / CalPERS ESG probe / SAVE Act / anti-sanctuary (AB 1708 author in CA Assembly). Not in Congress for 2022 RFMA vote.
profile.background: Harvard BA (Political Science 2007); Loyola Marymount MA (teaching credentials); Yale JD. Teach for America (Manual Arts HS Los Angeles). Yale Law Journal editor; clerked Federal Reserve Bank of NY; Irell & Manella attorney. CA Assembly AD-6 12/5/2016 - 11/30/2022. 2021 Newsom recall replacement candidate (6th of 46, 3.5%); author *Recall Gavin Newsom* (Jan 2021). U.S. Representative CA-03 since 1/3/2023. Party-switched R → Independent 3/9/2026. Chair, K-12 Subcommittee on Ed & Workforce. Wife Chelsee (m. 12/30/2023).

kevin-kiley.notes_set: CA-03 INDEPENDENT (formerly R — switched 3/9/2026; remains in R Conference) — vocal CA parental-rights / anti-COVID-mandate champion who built statewide profile during 2021 Newsom recall. Running 2026 re-election in newly-redrawn CA-06. HARD TRUEs (cited): sanctity_of_life q1 (YEA H.R. 26 Born-Alive Survivors Roll Call 29 1/11/2023); q4 (SBA Pro-Life tracking page); biblical_marriage q2 (Save Women's Sports H.R. 28 119th party-line passage); family_child_sovereignty q0 (chairs K-12 subcmte + ECCA tax-credit scholarship/ESA cosponsor enacted via reconciliation); q1 (publicly championed AB 1314 + AB 1955 SCOTUS-vindicated parental-notification position); economic_stewardship q4 (CalPERS ESG probe — 71% loss on $468M Clean Energy/Tech Fund); election_integrity q1 (YEA SAVE Act H.R. 22 + SiriusXM evangelism); border q0 (H.R. 2 Secure the Border support); q2 (authored AB 1708 to repeal CA SB 54 sanctuary law); industry_capture q0 (statewide anti-Newsom-COVID-mandate champion, '100% against mandatory vaccine', 'terminate state of emergency on day one'); self_defense q1 (NRA-PVF AQ endorsement 2016). SOFT TRUEs: biblical_marriage q4 (X post celebrating SCOTUS block of CA gender-secrecy-from-parents policy); family q2 (parental-rights pattern); christian_liberty q1 (anti-COVID-mandate religious-exemption advocacy); economic q0 (R Conference pattern on H.R. 5403 anti-CBDC); q2 (Heritage Action 64% — not deficit hawk, SOFT only); election q3 (vocal CA mass-mail-in critic). HARD FALSEs (HETERODOX-R catches, cited): foreign_policy_restraint q0 (voted NO on Iran War Powers Resolution 215-208 — only 4 Rs voted YES, Kiley sided with executive, citing 'power of the purse' instead); q1 (forced Ukraine aid discharge petition as 218th signer against Speaker Johnson + YES on Israel/Ukraine/Taiwan supplemental); q3 (TrackAIPAC career $86,986 from AIPAC + NORPAC). NULLs (looked, no public position): sanctity q0/q2/q3 (federal abortion ban/ESCR/IVF/euthanasia — federal ban vote not located); biblical q0/q1/q3 (not in Congress for RFMA, no specific federal one-man-one-woman/anti-civil-unions statement, no-fault divorce); family q3/q4; christian_liberty q0/q2/q3/q4; economic q1/q3 (sound money/usury); election q0/q2/q4 (paper ballots/single-day/Zuckerbucks); border q1/q3/q4 (DACA/E-Verify/birthright); self_defense q0/q2/q3/q4 (constitutional carry/NFA-GCA/castle/ATF specifics); foreign q2/q4 (aid-conditioning/WHO-UN-NATO); industry q1/q2/q3/q4 (PREP-shields/Big Ag/raw-milk/Pentagon-audit).

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-05 (R incumbent since 1/3/2009; CA-04 2009-2023, redistricted to CA-05 · Chair Judiciary Subcmte Immigration Integrity Security & Enforcement · running 2026 re-election)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing archetype_party_default. Scored from 118th-119th Congress roll calls (Mayorkas impeachment NAY 2/13/2024, Ukraine aid YES H.R. 8035 4/19/2024, Iran WPR NAY 6/2025-6/2026, RFMA NAY 12/8/2022, BBA H.J.Res. 84 introduced, anti-CBDC H.R. 5403 cosponsor, SAVE Act, Secure Border H.R. 2 cosponsor), TrackAIPAC ($45,538 career from pro-Israel PACs), Heritage Action lifetime 88% (118th 68%), Planned Parenthood scorecard 0%, NRA-PVF endorsement, SBA Pro-Life endorsement, bipartisan Pentagon Streamline Budgeting Act with Jayapal. CHIEF HETERODOX-R catches: (1) Mayorkas impeachment NAY 2/13/2024 on constitutional/Madisonian grounds (one of 3-4 R defectors); (2) Ukraine aid YES 4/19/2024 ('History warns us of allowing aggression to grow unchecked'); (3) Iran WPR NAY (against the 4 R restraint defectors); (4) AIPAC PAC career $45,538; (5) HETERODOX-positive on industry_capture q4 — co-introduced Streamline Pentagon Budgeting Act bipartisan with Jayapal/Davidson/Garamendi/Moulton. Held R line on RFMA NAY (NOT a heterodox catch — confirmed against initial speculation).
profile.background: UCLA BA Political Science 1978. CA State Assembly 1982-1992, 1996-2000; CA State Senate 2000-2008. Ran for Governor (2003 recall), Lt. Gov (2006, 2010), Controller — all lost. U.S. Representative since 1/3/2009 (CA-04 2009-2023, CA-05 since 2023). Wife Lori (d. 12/15/2021 at age 61); two children Justin and Shannah. Chair Judiciary Subcmte on Immigration Integrity, Security & Enforcement. Famous House orator (constitutional originalist).

tom-mcclintock.notes_set: CA-05 R INCUMBENT — long-tenured fiscal/constitutional conservative, Judiciary Immigration Integrity Subcmte chair, House orator known for originalist floor speeches. HARD TRUEs (cited): sanctity_of_life q0/q1 (SBA Pro-Life endorsement; cosponsor Born-Alive + Life at Conception + Pain-Capable + Defund PP + Conscience Protection); q4 (Planned Parenthood scorecard 0%); biblical_marriage q0/q1 (NAY on RFMA H.R. 8404 12/8/2022 Roll 513 — held line with GOP majority; 2008 statement 'calling a homosexual partnership a marriage doesn't make it one'); q2 (Protection of Women & Girls in Sports H.R. 734 floor support); family q0 (long-time school choice + SCHOOL Act cosponsor); q2 (CRT Act cosponsor); economic q0 (cosponsor H.R. 5403 Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act); q2 (introduced H.J.Res. 84 BBA constitutional amendment); q4 (signed Judiciary letter to Climate Action 100+ challenging ESG/antitrust); election q1 (SAVE Act floor speech); border q0 (original cosponsor H.R. 2 Secure the Border Act); q1 (introduced H.R. 7640 Shut Down Sanctuary Policies Act 2026 + Immigration Integrity Subcmte chair); q2 (Fox News op-ed w/ Jim Jordan against sanctuary cities); q3 (H.R. 2 mandatory E-Verify provisions); self_defense q1 (NRA-PVF A-rated/endorsed). SOFT TRUEs: biblical_marriage q4 (RFMA NAY + H.R. 734 floor support combination); industry q4 (HETERODOX-positive — co-introduced bipartisan Streamline Pentagon Budgeting Act with Jayapal/Davidson/Garamendi/Moulton: 'It needs to stop'). HARD FALSEs (HETERODOX-R catches against restraint, cited): foreign_policy_restraint q0 (voted NAY on Iran War Powers Resolution; against the 4 R defectors Massie/Fitzpatrick/Barrett/Davidson); q1 (voted YES on H.R. 8035 Ukraine Security Supplemental 4/19/2024 with floor speech 'History warns us of allowing aggression to grow unchecked'); q3 (TrackAIPAC career $45,538 from AIPAC + AMP pro-Israel PACs). NULLs: sanctity q2/q3 (ESCR/IVF/euthanasia); biblical q3 (no-fault divorce); family q1/q3/q4 (parental notification federal vote / porn age-verify / faith-based adoption); christian_liberty q0-q4 (constitutional-libertarian First-Amendment-neutrality posture, no specific Christian-symbol/Sabbath/Johnson-Amendment advocacy located); economic q1/q3 (sound money/Fed audit specific cosponsorship not located / usury); election q0/q2/q3/q4 (paper ballots/single-day/mass mail-in opposition specifically/Zuckerbucks); border q4 (birthright citizenship floor speech not located); self_defense q0/q2/q3/q4 (constitutional carry vote/NFA-GCA repeal/castle/ATF specific); foreign q2/q4 (aid-conditioning on Christian persecution / WHO-UN-NATO); industry q1/q2/q3 (PREP shields / Big Ag / raw-milk / USDA-EPA-specific). Mayorkas impeachment NAY (constitutional grounds) is notable on-the-record heterodoxy but doesn't map directly to a rubric cell.
